scripts.db:schema:mermaid: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm -w /app/apps/api atlas schema inspect --env local --url env://src --format '{{ mermaid . }}' > docs/diagrams/er.mmd
scripts.db:migrate:diff: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm -w /app/apps/api atlas migrate diff --env local
scripts.db:migrate:apply: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm -w /app/apps/api atlas migrate apply --env local
scripts.db:migrate:status: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm -w /app/apps/api atlas migrate status --env local
scripts.db:seed: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T db psql -U postgres -d lab < apps/api/db/seed.sql
